title: convolvulus tedmoorei
intro: Convolvulus tedmoorei, also known as the Ted Moore's bindweed or Ted Moore's morning glory, is a species of flowering plant in the family Convolvulaceae. This plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues, including inflammation and fever, due to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Convolvulus tedmoorei include its potential to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and coughs. Convolvulus tedmoorei can be prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, which is often used to treat its associated health benefits.
